name: Chocolate Chip Cookies
recipeIngredient: 3 cups Quaker Oats, uncooked (quick or old-fashioned)
recipeInstructions:
1. Beat butter and sugars together until creamy.
2. Blend in eggs and vanilla.
3. Sift flour, baking soda, and salt together.
4. Add the sifted ingredients to the creamed mixture; blend well.
5. Stir in oats, chocolate pieces, and chopped walnuts.
6. Drop by teaspoonfuls onto ungreased cookie sheets.
7. Bake in a preheated moderate oven (375°F) for 10 to 12 minutes.
